nasb.text: Then the elders of the congregation shall lay their hands on the head of the bull before the Lord, and the bull shall be slain before the Lord.

esv.text: And the elders of the congregation shall lay their hands on the head of the bull before the Lord, and the bull shall be killed before the Lord.

cnv.text: 會眾的長老要在耶和華面前按手在公牛的頭上，然後在耶和華面前宰殺那公牛。

ccb.text: 众长老要把手放在牛头上，在耶和华面前宰牛。
